[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10101000 3
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 01011000 3
6 01011100 4
7 01110101 5

01 10 01011000 3 match 5
12 21 01010100 3
23 32 01110101 5 match 7
34 43 01010010 3
45 54 00010010 2
56 65 00010100 2
67 76 10101000 3 match 0
70 07 00001000 1

13 31 01010100 3

46 64 01010000 2
57 75 00000000 a match 1 2 3 4
60 06 01011000 3 match 5
71 17 00001000 1

47 74 00000000 a match 1 2 3 4

61 16 01011100 4 match 6
72 27 00100000 1

37 73 00100000 1
